blocksCertification: Low product density by design (how-to/explainer): only 3 verified images embed, well under the 8-image bar. This is correct for the format and product cards were NOT forced, but it means the piece is not a certification candidate on visual count alone.

The article's primary recommended board — the BU0836A named by the official Bridge Command guide — has NO verified product photo, so it appears as text + Amazon/Leo Bodnar links only. Source a real BU0836A photo before certifying if the piece should picture its top pick.
Arduino Leonardo 2026 price is not hard-verified (body says '~$25 check-current'); confirm before certifying.
BU0836A (~$42) and BU0836X (~$77) USD figures are GBP-based approximations (£33 / £59.99 confirmed at source); confirm live USD before certifying.
Codex graphics recommended (pot-wiring diagram, board-choice decision tree, string-friction diagram) would materially lift a low-image how-to more than product cards.
